title: AI Innovation Hub Intro Video
description: 20-second cinematic intro for AI Innovation Hub. Dark futuristic theme with neon blue highlights, glowing data visuals, and AI-like neutral narration. Include English subtitles matching narration text.
narration_text: Welcome to AI Innovation Hub — where ideas become innovation. Join our global community of creators, dreamers, and thinkers shaping the future of AI.
ending: Glowing AI Innovation Hub logo fade-in with tagline 'Empowering Innovation Together'.
